base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of vire_split_to_keese — a character from 1986 legend of zelda. Vire — red-winged bat-devil. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Vire — red-winged bat-devil; 2-frame hover; split into 2 Keese on hit
